chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl. Misc. Appln. No.S-385 of 2020. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.02.2022. Mr. Bahadur Ali Shahani, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Abdul Khalique Bughio, advocate for the respondents No.3 & 4. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. -.-.-.-.-.-.- The applicant by way of instant Crl.Misc.Application has impugned an order dated 01.12.2020, passed by learned 4th Judicial Magistrate, Larkana, whereby the FIR Crime No.104/2020, lodged by applicant with P.S Rehmatpur was cancelled under “C” class. With the consent of learned counsel for the parties, the cancellation of subject FIR under ‘B’ class is converted into ‘C’ class with permission to the applicant to file direct complaint of the incident before the Court having jurisdiction, if so is advised. The instant Crl. Misc.Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
